LanguageData.GodHand_BoatFilling.stages.0.label: Filled by the rod (tight)
LanguageData.GodHand_BoatFilling.stages.0.description: This rough mechanical invasion is nothing but torture... My body is being torn apart... The pain makes me want to scream in agony...
LanguageData.GodHand_BoatFilling.stages.1.label: Filled by the rod (adapting)
LanguageData.GodHand_BoatFilling.stages.1.description: This constant swelling... surprisingly, it's not so unbearable anymore. My sanity is being eroded by this foreign presence bit by bit...
LanguageData.GodHand_BoatFilling.stages.2.label: Filled by the rod (dilated)
LanguageData.GodHand_BoatFilling.stages.2.description: Everything inside has been stretched wide... As long as the mechanism continues its cycle, I feel a twisted sense of comfort...
LanguageData.GodHand_BoatFilling.stages.3.label: Filled by the rod (broken)
LanguageData.GodHand_BoatFilling.stages.3.description: Ah... My body has completely conformed to the shape of the device. Just keep going, let me be filled forever. This intoxication... there's no turning back...
LanguageData.GodHand_BoatEmptying.stages.0.label: Withdrawal (void)
LanguageData.GodHand_BoatEmptying.stages.0.descriptio: That sense of fullness is gone... It's cold inside now. I want to be filled again... Please, put me back...
